prompt: Photorealistic interior photography of a modern upscale living room. A Samsung Frame TV is mounted on a light-colored wall, displaying a classic oil painting of a landscape. The TV is wrapped in an ornate antique gold decorative frame with intricate carved baroque details and a rich gold-tone finish, approximately 3 inches wide, making it look like a real framed masterpiece painting. The frame is the visual hero of the image. The room features a cream-colored linen sofa with neutral throw pillows, a round wooden coffee table with a small plant and coffee table books, warm ambient lighting from a floor lamp, a large potted fiddle leaf fig plant in the corner, light hardwood floors, and soft natural light from a nearby window. Warm color temperature throughout. Premium home decor aesthetic. Shot with a wide-angle lens, eye level, interior design magazine quality photography.

Close-up detail product photography of an ornate antique gold picture frame corner. The frame has intricate carved baroque details, scrollwork patterns, and a rich warm gold finish with subtle patina. The shot is taken at a 45-degree angle to show the depth and dimensionality of the carved ridges, floral motifs, and layered profile of the frame. A woman's hand with natural manicure gently touches the corner of the frame to show scale — the frame is approximately 3 inches wide. The frame is designed to wrap around a Samsung Frame TV as a decorative accent. Side profile product photography of an ornate antique gold decorative frame designed to wrap around a Samsung Frame TV. The frame is shown from a direct side view to clearly display its 3-inch depth and width profile. The cross-section reveals the ornate carved front face with baroque scrollwork details and the flat inner channel that attaches flush to the TV edge. The gold finish is warm and rich with subtle antique patina. The frame piece is standing upright or propped at a slight angle on a clean white studio surface. Clean white/light gray background with professional studio lighting that highlights the gold finish and shows the profile depth clearly.
